# Bridge Domain

## Filter by bridge domain's name

Example: domain name value

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_bd.name:iserver.output.default
```

Example: tenant and domain name value

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_bd.tenant_name:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_bd.name:devel.debug
```
